kali.description: Kali Linux security tools + Metasploit Framework — 70+ tools including msfconsole, msfvenom, nmap, sqlmap, hydra, etc. Connects via SSE to docker compose service on port 9001.

wireshark.description: WireMCP Server — Wireshark/tshark for packet capture and network analysis (7 tools)

screenshot.description: Screenshot MCP Server — headless Chromium screenshots for bug bounty PoC evidence capture (4 tools)

blhackbox.description: blhackbox core MCP server — recon, tool execution, graph queries, report generation

hexstrike.description: HexStrike MCP Server — full upstream HexStrike Gamma MCP service connected to the HexStrike API container.

boaz.description: BOAZ MCP Server — upstream BOAZ-MCP Gamma server exposed over SSE.
